promotion.executable_surface: No promoted skill has hooks or automatic command substitutions. Upstream CLI examples are retained as user-approved commands. The upstream memory fallback script was not vendored.
promotion.credential_behavior: No credentials are requested by the skills. MCP server browser artifacts, traces, screenshots, Lighthouse reports, and heap snapshots must be kept out of version control.
promotion.network_behavior: MCP browser navigation and performance tooling can contact target pages; repo MCP config disables usage statistics and update checks. CrUX is disabled in repo-managed MCP config unless explicitly re-enabled.
